overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City. The player navigates neon-lit streets, crosses intersections with futuristic traffic, and moves through urban plazas and alleys filled with holographic advertisements and diverse pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway adjacent to multi-lane road

events.description: turning right into a covered pedestrian plaza with green flooring and planters
turning left to face the street traffic again

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to moving traffic, then turning into a covered pedestrian area with shops

entered.detail: sleek silver futuristic vehicle with illuminated accents driving along the street
large vertical holographic advertisement displaying a pink neon figure
overhead structure providing cover over the pedestrian walkway
large circular planter containing palm trees and greenery

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a walk along a neon-lit sidewalk next to a busy street with futuristic vehicles. The player turns into a covered pedestrian area with orange tiles and planters before turning back toward the street. The environment features tall glass buildings and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy multi-lane street with futuristic vehicle traffic

events.description: stopping to observe the traffic flow on the multi-lane road
pedestrian in a vest walks past the camera from right to left

agents.ego_description: standing near the curb watching futuristic cars drive by on the multi-lane road

notable_agents.action: man in a vest walking past the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: turquoise colored futuristic car with glowing taillights
wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow and black striped pattern
elevated walkway or transit bridge connecting buildings above the street

segments.scene_description: The camera stops at street level to observe the flow of futuristic traffic on the multi-lane road. Various sleek vehicles pass by with neon lighting, while a pedestrian walks past the camera. The scene shows the busy urban environment with overhead bridge structures and crosswalk markings.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with large crosswalk and holographic billboards

events.description: beginning to cross the wide intersection using the yellow striped crosswalk
turning left at the corner into a new street section with different buildings

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with yellow striped crosswalk, navigating around moving vehicles

entered.detail: massive vertical digital billboard displaying a pink neon figure with 'Changwang' text
multi-story building with distinctive yellow horizontal accent lighting
enclosed pedestrian bridge spanning across the street between buildings

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the wide urban intersection using the prominent yellow-striped crosswalk, moving toward a building with a large pink holographic billboard. After crossing, the camera turns left onto a new street section featuring buildings with yellow accent lighting and overhead pedestrian bridges.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pedestrian alley with overhead signage and seating areas

events.description: entering the narrower alleyway with overhead neon signs and concrete benches
moving into darker, more enclosed space with concentrated overhead neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow alleyway with benches and planters, passing under multiple holographic billboards

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a concrete bench under the neon signs

entered.detail: cluster of hanging holographic advertisements and neon signage spanning the alley
modern concrete seating arranged along the right wall of the alley
tall planters with tropical vegetation placed along the walkway
tight concrete walls of the narrow passage with small windows

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow pedestrian alleyway sheltered from the open street, featuring concrete benches, large potted plants, and dense overhead neon signage. The lighting becomes darker and more atmospheric as the camera moves deeper into the enclosed space with walls on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with central tree, food vendors, and LED art installation

events.description: emerging from narrow alley into open plaza with a large illuminated tree
approaching food vendor stalls with red lanterns and outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza, passing by pedestrians and food vendors near the large illuminated tree

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking and gathering near the food stalls

entered.detail: massive central tree with uplighting and hanging decorations dominating the plaza
street food carts with red lanterns and illuminated displays
large wall covered in multicolored LED lights forming abstract patterns
wooden benches arranged in the plaza seating area

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow alley, the scene opens into a vibrant urban plaza centered around a massive illuminated tree. The area features food vendor stalls with red lanterns, outdoor seating, and a striking colorful LED pixel wall. Pedestrians walk through the open space, creating a lively atmosphere distinct from the enclosed alley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched metropolis, moving from wide, traffic-heavy boulevards into a secluded alleyway before opening into a vibrant urban plaza. It begins with a walk along a neon-lit sidewalk and through a tiled pedestrian area, before pausing at the street level to observe the flow of sleek, futuristic vehicles beneath overhead bridges. As the camera moves forward, it crosses a wide intersection via a yellow-striped crosswalk toward a pink holographic billboard, then turns left past buildings accented with yellow lighting. The scene then shifts from the open road into a narrow, atmospheric pedestrian alleyway characterized by concrete benches and dense overhead signage that darkens the environment. Finally, the camera emerges from the enclosed space into a lively plaza centered around a massive illuminated tree, complete with red lanterns from food stalls and a colorful LED pixel wall.
